title: Plants vs zombies from Mythling
description:
Survive with Plants vs zombies world and grow plants.
Plan Your defence.
body:
Plants vs. Zombies Mod
Defend your world with plants.
This mod adds over 30 unique plants inspired by Plants vs. Zombies. Use the Plant Grower to obtain seeds, collect sunlight, and place plants to protect your land from zombies.

Features:
Over 30 different plants, each with unique abilities

Sunlight-based planting system

Use the Plant Grower to get plant seeds

Zombies appear with corn heads or bucket heads

Includes 3 custom biomes:

Lush Forest

Autumn Forest

Primary Forest

Add 6 custom effects

Plant, defend, and survive.
